violations.text: There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

Staff informed inspector that the hand washing sink in the basement is also used to wash and rinse ice coffee containers. Hand wash sinks must be used for hand washing only. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

Working containers of liquid ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

The condensate from the service area refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Staff informed inspector that the drain tube is temporary due to a prior leak. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025
